ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: Pickup_Required__c && ( ISBLANK(TEXT(Pickup_Country__c)) || ISBLANK( Available_Pick_Up_Day__c ) || ISBLANK( TEXT(Available_Pick_Up_Times__c )) || ISBLANK( Contact_name__c ) || ISBLANK( Pick_up_Contact_Phone__c ) || ISBLANK( Pick_up_Contact_Email__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill up the pickup details
